## [00:00 - 02:40]

Money follows attention. You want to know the easiest way on the planet to get known? If you want to reach millions, you want to spend zero on advertising and do it as fast as possible, you need to get on podcasts or even better yet, you should host your own show. Look, the numbers don't lie. 57% of the population now listen to podcasts on a daily basis and a large pursuers of those listeners make more than $75,000 a year. Look, what does all this mean to you? Bottom line, it means follow the money. This Grant Cardone, I'm one of the most prolific podcasters in the world, both as a guest and as a host. I have personally launched six successful podcasts in my own, racking up tens of millions of downloads and look, I've been on a hundred different shows including Dennis Miller's School of Greatness, Adam Carolla and Logan Paul. More importantly though, I know how to leverage free exposure and turn it into hard, cold cash. And I can teach you how to do exactly the same thing. Look, it doesn't matter who you are or what you do, you can have a successful podcast now. With over a hundred million listeners every day, there's an audience waiting for your message. I'm going to teach you how to position yourself and what you sell. Exactly what to do actually to get even booked on a podcast, how to start and grow your own podcast, and most importantly, how to maximize your monetization from every listener. You're going to find all this and more inside the 10X podcast system. There's everything here you need to get in the podcast game and absolutely smash it. It's the most easy to understand and most comprehensive podcast system ever created. When you download my podcast manual, you'll immediately shortcut your success. You'll know exactly what strategies to use, what mistakes to avoid, and what steps to take to dominate the airways. You're also getting my step-by-step video tutorials. You'll get checklists to make sure you get booked and maximize results from every appearance that you make. And more importantly, you're getting our podcast swipe files that breaks down my podcast and the ones that I've been on so you can hear for yourself how to do it right. Because this is about way more than just being on a podcast or getting downloaded. It's about getting you paid. So enough talk. Let's get down to business. Jumping into this thing now, let's get you intentionally known as one of the masters of the podcast.
